en: If I start talking... You please. So what does that make me, Laurel, for taking the opportunity?
Men are just different people when they're hanging on to the bottom rung.
Maybe I am taking advantage. Does that make me a bad person? Huh?
ko: 어쩌면 내가 이용하고 있는 걸지도 몰라.

en: Look, all I know is that I found someone and he was popular and charming and not so nice to me and he died, okay?
ko: 내가 아는 건, 내가 누군가를 찾았다는 거야,

en: So why should I let this guy go?
ko: 그럼 왜 이 남자를 놓아줘야 해?

en: When everything in my body says that this one is the one.
ko: 왜, 내 몸의 모든 것이 이 사람이 맞다고 말하는데?

en: Take it easy, all right? I was just looking for a few fun details, that's all.
Oh. Well, why didn't you say so?
Well, I don't know if you're interested in this one little detail.
ko: 음, 나는 네가 이 작은 세부사항에 관심이 있는지 모르겠어.

en: But I was just about to tell you that I love him.
ko: 하지만 나는 방금 그를 사랑한다고 말하려고 했어.

en: I do. I love him. I love him.
And I don't care what you think.
ko: 나는 그를 사랑하고 네가 어떻게 생각하든 상관 없어.

en: I love him for the man he wants to be and I love him for the man that he almost is.
ko: 나는 그가 되고 싶어하는 남자를 사랑해,

en: I love him, Laurel. I love him.
ko: 나는 그를 사랑해, 로렐. 나는 그를 사랑해.
